content: Upgrade 1: Install readabs and pysdmx packages
Upgrade 1: Create abs_service.py with get_australian_macro function
Upgrade 1: Add CPI and GDP Growth badges to MacroContext strip
Upgrade 2: Add SECTOR_RATE_SENSITIVITY lookup table to simulation
Upgrade 2: Add AUD_TRANSMISSION_MULTIPLIER and apply_aud_transmission function
Upgrade 2: Inject sector sensitivity into agent reasoning context
Upgrade 3: Add 5 new ACLED events (US tariffs, China bans, ASEAN pivot, RBA hike, Taiwan chips)
Upgrade 4: Create AustralianEconomicContext component with 7 metrics + tooltips
Upgrade 4: Replace static exposures list with dynamic context panel in sidebar
Upgrade 5: Add AUSTRALIAN_MARKET_CONTEXT templates to ReportAgent system prompt
Test: Screenshot showing new Economic Context panel (after Upgrade 4)
